recommendations.title: Saw IV
recommendations.overview: Despite Jigsaw's death, and in order to save the lives of two of his colleagues, Lieutenant Rigg is forced to take part in a new game, which promises to test him to the limit.

recommendations.title: Mother's Day
recommendations.overview: Crazed members of a sadistic family return to their childhood home to terrorize the new owners.

recommendations.title: The Barrens
recommendations.overview: A man takes his family on a camping trip and becomes convinced they are being stalked by the legendary monster of the New Jersey Pine Barrens: the Jersey Devil.

recommendations.title: Abattoir
recommendations.overview: A reporter unearths an urban legend about a home being constructed from rooms where horrific tragedies have occurred.
After the death of his wife and child, an author travels to Barcelona to see his estranged brother and dying father, where he learns that his life is plagued by events that occur on 11/11/11.
